### 4.2. Sentiment Analysis

Sentiment analysis is a subfield of natural language processing (NLP) that deals with the study and interpretation of people's emotions and opinions expressed through text.

In the context of online reviews, sentiment analysis aims to determine whether the review is positive, negative, or neutral.

    def analyze_sentiments(self, text):

        text = text.lower()

        text = re.sub(r'\s+','', text)

        # Tokenize the text
        tokens = text.split()
